assertions.title: Bar chart shows 14 days with labeled axes, zero-height bars for empty days

steps.observed: Bar chart shows 'Calls in the Last 14 Days'

steps.action: Verify zero-height bars for empty days
steps.observed: All 14 days show 0 calls with flat baseline

evidence.network: GET /api/calls -> error, but page handles gracefully

assertions.title: Loading skeletons shown while data fetches, never flash 0s

steps.observed: Page shows error state immediately - no skeleton loading state observed
Error banner 'Unable to load dashboard data right now.' appears instantly

assertions.issues: API returned error 'Failed to fetch calls', preventing observation of normal loading state. Cannot verify skeleton loading behavior when API is failing.

steps.action: Search page text for error strings
steps.observed: All cards display clean values: 0, $0, 0:00, N/A
Shows '0' for all time, this week, today

assertions.title: Cards use clean layout with big numbers and clear labels

steps.observed: Large '0' with 'TOTAL CALLS' header and 'All Time', 'This Week', 'Today' sub-labels
Clean layout with 'No calls yet' placeholder, legend showing 'Answered: 0' and 'Voicemail: 0'
Large '0' with descriptive text 'Answered calls with both name and request filled'

steps.expected: Revenue, cost, and ROI clearly displayed
steps.observed: Clean layout: '$0' revenue, '$0/mo' cost, 'N/A' ROI with clear labels

frictions.description: API error on /api/calls prevented testing normal loading state with data
frictions.resolution: Page shows error state instead of loading skeletons when API fails

blockers.description: Google Sheets API returned error - 'Failed to fetch calls'. This prevented observing the normal loading flow with actual data.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Server running, but API endpoint returns error. Page handles error gracefully with user-friendly message.

summary: Tested 4 assertions: 3 passed, 1 blocked. VAL-DASH-010 passed: bar chart correctly shows 14 days with labeled axes and zero-height bars. VAL-DASH-011 blocked: Cannot verify loading skeletons because API error prevents normal data fetch flow. VAL-DASH-012 passed: No 'undefined', 'null', or 'NaN' displayed; all empty values handled gracefully with '0', '$0', '0:00', 'N/A'. VAL-DASH-013 passed: Cards use clean layout with large numbers and clear descriptive labels.
